data.title: AUSTRAC Slaps Cointree with $48K Fine for Late SMRs – Who’s Next?
data.description:
AUSTRAC has fined Melbourne-based crypto exchange Cointree A$75,120 for submitting suspicious matter reports late, saying the delay has hindered investigators tracing criminal funds. The case reflects Australia’s drive to shutter inactive exchanges and reinforce anti-money-laundering controls.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/austrac-fines-cointree-48k-late-smrs/

data.title: Bloomberg: US financial institution Fifth Third Bancorp plans to increase its crypto asset layout
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fifth Third Bancorp., a financial institution headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, began to establish partnerships with cryptocurrency companies about five years ago, but did not make major investments until the regulatory environment became clearer. According to its chief strategy officer Ben Hoffman, after establishing a small group of crypto customers who use the bank's deposit accounts and payment capabilities, the institution is considering how to further expand its crypto business. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Trump's "encryption committee" suffered a setback in its first vote in Congress, and its influence was questioned
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The "Crypto Committee" established by Trump failed to exert the expected influence in the first key vote in Congress, causing the ability of White House Crypto and AI Czar David Sacks and Digital Asset Advisory Committee Executive Director Bo Hines to be questioned. The committee aims to promote cryptocurrency-related legislation, but failed to make a breakthrough in the recent vote on the bill on stablecoin regulation. Analysts pointed out that the committee's low-key operation and lack of clear policy direction make it difficult to gain sufficient support within Congress. In addition, crypto projects involved in by Trump himself and his family, such as Trump Tokens and World Liberty Financial, have also raised concerns about ethics and conflicts of interest, further undermining the committee's credibility. Democratic lawmakers have expressed concern about these potential conflicts of interest, believing that this may affect the fairness of relevant legislation. At present, Trump's "Crypto Committee" faces the dual challenges of reshaping its image and enhancing its influence. (New York Post)

data.title: South Korean woman sentenced to 2 years in prison for stealing about $500,000 in crypto assets from boyfriend while he was sleeping
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A South Korean woman was sentenced to 2 years in prison for stealing her boyfriend's cryptocurrency assets while he was asleep. Court documents show that the woman took advantage of her boyfriend's sleep to unlock his phone and transfer about $500,000 in crypto assets. The prosecution pointed out that the defendant planned and carried out the theft after learning that her boyfriend held a large amount of crypto assets. The court believed that the defendant's behavior was highly premeditated and serious, so it made a severe sentence. (Decrypt)

data.title: Basel Medical Group, a US-listed company, launches $1 billion BTC acquisition strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Basel Medical Group Ltd, a US-listed company, announced today that it has initiated exclusive negotiations for a total of $1 billion in Bitcoin (BTC) acquisitions. The plan will significantly diversify the company's financial reserves while continuing to focus on expansion in the medical services sector. (Globe Newswire)

data.title: BNB Chain: As of today, the Foundation wallet has purchased 10 tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BNB Chain released a token purchase announcement for the $100 million incentive plan, announcing that the BNB Chain Foundation wallet has completed a new round of asset purchases. After spending $25,000 each to purchase KOMA, KILO, and WOD, as of today, the BNB Chain Foundation wallet has purchased 10 tokens, namely: Broccoli (714), ST, Mubarak (6f6), AIOT, SKYAI, CGPT, SIREN, KOMA, KILO, and WOD.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,600 USDT with a 3.47% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 16, 2025, 15:12 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,601.98999 USDT, with a narrowed 3.47% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Fifth Third Bank Explores Expansion in Cryptocurrency Sector
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Fifth Third Bancorp, headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, has been collaborating with cryptocurrency companies for approximately five years. However, significant investments were postponed until the regulatory environment became clearer. Ben Hoffman, the bank's Chief Strategy Officer, indicated that the time is now ripe for further expansion.

Fifth Third Bank has developed a small client base within the cryptocurrency sector, utilizing its deposit accounts and payment capabilities. These clients employ the bank's services for operational tasks such as payroll processing and income reception.

The history of Fifth Third Bank dates back to 1858, originating as the Bank of the Ohio Valley in Cincinnati, Ohio. In 1871, it was acquired by Third National Bank. In the early 20th century, Third National Bank merged with Fifth National Bank, resulting in the formation of Fifth Third Bank.

data.title: Greeks.live: The market remains cautiously optimistic after BTC breaks through $100,000, and there may be large fluctuations in the near future
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam posted on the X platform that the market remained cautiously optimistic after Bitcoin broke through $100,000, focusing on the important resistance level of $108,000 and the 4-hour EMA200 (about $73,000) as key indicators. Most analysts believe that the recent formation of a diamond consolidation pattern indicates that there will be large fluctuations, but there are differences in direction.
Ethereum's prospects have sparked heated discussions. Some traders are optimistic about ETH, believing that Coinbase's acquisition, ETF staking and passive buying of index funds will support prices, and firmly believe that it can reach $4,000 by the end of the year.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 1,894 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 9,246 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 1,894 BTC today, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 3,977 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 631,962 BTC, worth US$65.51 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 9,246 ETH, of which Fidelity had an outflow of 12,488 ETH. Fidelity currently holds 390,676 ETH, worth US$1.01 billion.

data.title: BSC Foundation address bought WOD, KILO, and KOMA, spending $25,000 each
KULR financial report: total value of cash and Bitcoin holdings exceeds $100 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: KULR, a New York Stock Exchange-listed company, released its latest financial report, which disclosed that the company has transformed to adopt a Bitcoin financial strategy this year. As of now, the total value of cash and Bitcoin holdings on its balance sheet has exceeded US$100 million, and there is almost no debt. As of the first quarter of 2025, KULR's Bitcoin holdings have increased to 716, and it has achieved a Bitcoin yield of 197.5% since the beginning of the year. In addition, KULR also announced the launch of a blockchain-based secure supply chain program to protect product-related data provided to customers. (The Block)

data.title: The U.S. Department of Justice charged 12 people with a $263 million crypto scam, with one victim losing 4,100 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Department of Justice has charged 12 defendants with participating in a $263 million cryptocurrency fraud and money laundering case. Most of the members of the criminal gang are young people who initially met because of online games. Later, they stole the victims' crypto assets through hacking, social engineering and burglary. One of the victims lost about 4,100 bitcoins, worth about $230 million. In order to cover up the illegal gains, the suspects stuffed a large amount of cash into Squishmallows plush toys and mailed them to each other through the U.S. postal system. The main suspects include 20-year-old Malone Lam (also known as "King Greavys"), 19-year-old Marlon Ferro ("GothFerrari") and 21-year-old Conor Flansburg ("Green Room"). According to the allegations, they once spent $500,000 in a nightclub, and owned private jets and luxury cars worth millions of dollars. At present, some suspects have been arrested in the United States, and two others are said to live in Dubai. (DL News)

data.title: Ukraine Prepares Legislation for National Bitcoin Reserve
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Ukrainian government is preparing legislation to establish a national strategic Bitcoin reserve. Ukraine currently holds approximately 46,351 BTC, valued at around $4.8 billion. These Bitcoins were primarily acquired through donations, asset seizures, and fundraising during the war. Ukrainian lawmaker Yaroslav Zhelezniak stated that the bill is in its final drafting stage and is expected to be submitted to parliament soon. The legislation aims to formally integrate Bitcoin into the national financial strategy.

Previously, the Ukrainian parliament passed a virtual assets bill, which was later withdrawn due to pressure from the presidential office and the National Securities Commission. The National Securities Commission has since proposed 80 amendments to improve the legal framework for crypto assets. This move highlights Ukraine's increasing emphasis on cryptocurrencies within its national financial strategy.

data.title: "The Dark Knight" screenwriter David Goyer launches blockchain-powered sci-fi project "Emergence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known screenwriter David S. Goyer (representative works include "The Dark Knight", "Blade" and Apple TV+ series "Foundation") announced at the 2025 Toronto Consensus Conference that he would launch a new science fiction project "Emergence". The project is based on the blockchain platform Incention he founded, and aims to build a cross-media narrative universe co-created by the community through Web3 technology and AI tools. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Crypto KOL POW sells 14 million LAUNCHCOINs in exchange for 16,071 SOLs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, crypto KOL pow (@traderpow) sold 14 million LAUNCHCOIN at $0.197 per coin today, in exchange for 16,071 SOL (about $2.76 million), and currently still holds 3 million LAUNCHCOIN (about $553,000).

data.title: Ukraine Considers Building a Strategic Cryptocurrency Reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ukrainian government is preparing legislation to establish a national strategic Bitcoin reserve. It is reported that Ukraine currently holds about 46,351 BTC, worth about US$4.8 billion. These bitcoins mainly come from donations, asset seizures and fundraising activities during the war. Ukrainian MP Yaroslav Zhelezniak said that the relevant bill has entered the final drafting stage and is expected to be submitted to parliament for deliberation soon. The bill aims to formally incorporate Bitcoin into the national fiscal strategy. Cryptocurrency exchange Binance is assisting Ukraine in advancing the plan, but stressed the need for major legislative reforms. Previously, the Ukrainian parliament passed a virtual asset bill, but it was withdrawn under pressure from the presidential office and the National Securities Committee. Currently, the National Securities Committee has proposed 80 amendments to improve the legal framework for crypto assets. Ukraine's move marks its increasing emphasis on cryptocurrencies in its national financial strategy. (Decrypt)
